notes: Oracle's integrated ERP/CRM/SCM suite; central technology advocated in the study; succeeded by Oracle E-Business Suite and later Fusion Applications
Integrated enterprise application suites from vendors like Oracle, SAP, PeopleSoft; study argues these are long-term winners

Standalone procurement platforms from Ariba, Commerce One; study identifies as vulnerable to suite vendor absorption
Referenced as emerging integration standard; RosettaNet and OAGI developing XML-based interoperability standards
Referenced as enabling technology for modular application architectures and component-based integration
Early standalone sales automation tools; largely absorbed into broader CRM suites by time of study
Cross-application workflow and process coordination; study identifies as major hidden cost driver in multi-vendor environments
